close_reason: Created solidity_library.bzl with optimizer and remapping support
description:
Create nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/solidity/solidity_library.bzl

Attributes:
- srcs: list of .sol source files
- deps: other solidity_library targets
- remappings: dict of import remappings (optional overrides)
- solc_version: per-target compiler version (optional)
- optimizer: bool (default True)
- optimizer_runs: int (default 200)

Implementation:
- Collect remappings from deps + explicit remappings
- Build solc standard JSON input
- Run solc --standard-json
- Output compiled artifacts directory
- Return SolidityLibraryInfo provider

Reference: nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/typescript/ts_library.bzl

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create solidity_library rule
